other_observers: Cheryl and Bill Day, Larry Arnold, Andrea Robinsong, Rob Sparks; Report being submitted by original finder
specific_location: Yard of observer at 39405 Lund Road.
description: Bird was found by observer hearing distinctive song. Visuals were obtained (see photo). Black bib and yellow breast were noted along with bold stripe over eye. Size was that of a large sparrow.Behaviors: Bird moved from perch to perch in my yard (fenceposts, bushes, and small trees) singing from different locations. Habitat was agricultural/riparian and alfalfa fields were present nearby during all detections. Singing was infrequent but heard all days bird was present.Call: Song was heard, but not recorded. Bird sang at least a few times all days it was present at location.Plumage: adult
